case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. NONE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM (16-135) (TRANSACTION ID # 59791529) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $2740.00 U.S. CURRENCY, AND DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT NONE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA SVARDA, ANGELA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,740.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT ANGELA SVARDA. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
